mapper.select: SELECT id, question, answer, category, sort_order, is_published AS published, admin_id, view_count, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM faq WHERE is_published = 1 AND embedding IS NULL
SELECT id, question, answer, category, sort_order, is_published AS published, admin_id, view_count, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM faq WHERE is_published = 1
SELECT id, question, answer, category, sort_order, is_published AS published, admin_id, view_count, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM faq WHERE is_published = 1 AND embedding IS NOT NULL
